title: Part Feeding CalWiz FlipSeparate Calibration
description:
Part Feeding CalWiz FlipSeparate Calibration

Flip & Separate Calibration

(1) Add the number of parts specified in the instructions to the feeder, and then click the <Run> button.

(2) Click the <Yes> button.  This starts the calibration process.

(3) Click the <Next> button.

Note:  If parts jump out of the feeder during the Flip & Separate Calibration, the calibration will not be performed properly and a Calibration Error message may be displayed.

The Calibration Error occurs because there is a discrepancy between the number of parts that the vision system expects to find and the number of parts that are actually on the feeder platform.

If parts jump out of the feeder, Click the <Abort> button to stop the current calibration in progress. Put the parts back into the feeder and Click the <Run> button again to re-run the calibration.
